achievements: Full auth system: login, register, forgot/reset password, email verification (link-based), rate limiting, role-based access with proxy.ts

CMS integration: Payload 3.x with custom admin views (UserManagement, CategoriesListView with drag-reorder), Lexical RichText rendering, 4 custom blocks (Callout, ChartEmbed, PerformanceTable, PriceTarget)
Content feed: server/client split architecture, infinite scroll, category filtering via parent-child hierarchy, grid/list view toggle, tag pages
Bookmarking system: Bookmarks collection, toggle action, saved page with empty states
CMD+/ search command palette with PostgreSQL full-text search (tsvector + GIN index, ts_rank/ts_headline)
Landing page redesign: Cryptonary-style hero, editorial two-column headers, SVG sparklines, responsive across all sections
Design system audit: M3 tonal palette, typography scale tokens, tracking tokens standardized across 30+ files
Profile settings: avatar upload with crop, profile update server actions, AvatarProvider context for real-time updates across layout
Admin panel: user management (block/unblock/delete, role/subscription editing), custom category list with drag-and-drop reorder
Error/empty state system: shared ErrorContent component, not-found/error pages for both guest and dashboard layouts, EmptyState with illustrations
improvements: top-app-bar.tsx has been rewritten 10+ times across sessions — consider stabilizing the component API and locking its props interface
dashboard-shell.tsx similarly over-edited — extract layout constants (spacing, breakpoints) into a shared config to reduce churn
Feed page exists at both /feed/page.tsx AND /feed/[[...slug]]/page.tsx — consolidate to avoid route conflicts
Multiple files created then immediately recreated (sidebar.tsx, avatar-upload.tsx, profile/page.tsx) — indicates unclear specs before coding; plan before implementing
Article card has separate grid (article-card.tsx) and list (article-card-list.tsx) components with duplicated CategoryPill — extract shared logic
mapToCardProps.ts duplicates timeAgo function also present in feed/page.tsx — single source of truth needed
lib/profile/actions.ts handles both profile updates and avatar uploads in one file (~1732 tok) — consider splitting concerns
next_tasks: Sprint 5: Wallet connection & payment flow — Stripe or on-chain subscription integration for Pro tier
Sprint 6: On-chain verification & subscription management — tie payments to role upgrades
Wire up settings pages that are still static: notifications (no backend), billing (mock data), plans (no checkout flow)
Add real data to tools pages (market-direction, picks, tracker, airdrops) — currently placeholder/coming-soon
Community page has static mock features — needs backend (posts, comments, reactions)
Add SEO metadata (generateMetadata) to article and feed pages
Write integration tests for auth flows and Payload API endpoints
Set up CI to run build + lint checks (build.yml and ci.yml exist but may need test steps)
risks: No tests exist — 0 test files in the project. Auth flows, API routes, and role gating are untested and high-risk for regressions
proxy.ts (Next.js 16 replacement for middleware) has been patched 5+ times — edge cases around blocked users, expired subscriptions, and route matching could slip through
Auth config (lib/auth/config.ts) has complex JWT callback logic with session refresh — the Do-Not-Repeat log shows multiple bugs around null session, updateSession() args, and StrictMode double-mount
In-memory rate limiter (lib/auth/rate-limit.ts) won't survive restarts or scale across instances — needs Redis or similar for production
No database migrations for profile fields (displayName, bio, website, avatar) — schema changes via Drizzle may not be applied
Payload and app share the same PostgreSQL database (different schemas) — no foreign key safety between payload.posts and public.users/bookmarks
HTML/ directory contains 15+ reference HTML files (~100K+ tokens) still in the repo — .gitignore added but local bloat remains
13 bugs logged in buglog.json, mostly auto-detected style/value fixes — suggests rapid iteration without design specs locked down first
sharp dependency was just added (latest commit) for Payload image resizing — verify it works in the target deployment environment (e.g., Docker/serverless may need native binaries)
